contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 25
- Description: Santos partner page follow-ups on agroverse_shop_beta. (1) Added Santos Chocolate Factory to the Brazilian path journey registry between Black King Ilheus and Itacare Cultural Experiences with tour-style description matching Black King and CIC tone (PR 96). The journey is hardcoded BRAZILIAN_PATH_DATA, not driven from partner_locations.json, so adding a partner page does not auto-populate the journey. (2) Optimized 4 Santos JPEGs from camera-direct 1125x1980 1.3-1.8MB each down to ~140-200KB each via magick resize 1600px long edge, quality 82, strip metadata, progressive interlace. Total page weight 6.4MB to 700KB, ~89% reduction (PR 97).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
